description: Narrow capability set for dynamically-spawned tile-* windows. Tiles only show AI answers and may receive markdown that came from untrusted sources (interviewer transcript / web pages). They MUST NOT be able to open external URLs (opener), register global shortcuts, or override window geometry — tile placement is governed exclusively by the Rust tile manager. Tiles can hide/show themselves so PANIC HIDE (F11) and the close-button keep working.
